report_name: Microsoft to Include Security Copilot in M365 E5 Licenses at No Extra Cost

tools.name: Microsoft Security Copilot
tools.description: An AI-powered security tool embedded in Microsoft Defender, Entra, Intune, and Purview, designed to help security teams investigate threats and respond to incidents. It is being bundled with Microsoft 365 E5 licenses.

identities.name: Microsoft
identities.description: The vendor that developed Microsoft Security Copilot and announced its inclusion in Microsoft 365 E5 licenses.
